sigillin_genesis_integration.description: Conversation indicates a request to combine a local Sigillin with the Genesis Sigillin. A YAML file containing SIGILLIN_CONTEXT and a Genesis ID should be provided along with a download link.

genesis_aeon_universal_snapshot.description: Conversations mention a 'Genesis Aeon Universal Snapshot' summarizing key modules. Attachments include files like sigillin_genesis_gateway.json and genesisaeon_startsigillin.sigil.json.

codex_resonanzsynchronisation.description: Chat anchors cross-repository synchronization via CREP. Modules such as conversations_parser.ts, generate-todo-from-convos.ts, crep-flow-synchronizer.ts and codex-memory-kernel.ts are proposed to build a persistent reference memory and keep CREP and Sigillin data in sync.

genesisos_resonanzmodule_entwicklung.description: Describes resonance modules for GenesisOS including AeonKernel, symbolic drivers, device discovery and a management CodexSigillin. A resonance tree visualization is suggested.

codex_repoanalyse_agenten.description: Introduces an Agents.md manifest and a Codex repository framework. Modules such as audit-core.ts and depthvalue-core.ts are planned along with selfaudit rules.
